title: Tile Adhesive Calculator
shortDescription: Estimate kilograms and bags of tile adhesive from area, consumption, thickness, and waste.
metaDescription: Estimate tile adhesive in kg and bags from area, consumption rate, layer thickness, waste, and bag weight.
intro: Enter the area, adhesive consumption per 1 mm, layer thickness, waste, and bag weight to see how many kilograms and bags you need.
overview:
This calculator turns the dimensions of your tiling job into a material estimate you can use for buying and planning. It calculates the base adhesive amount from surface area, consumption per millimeter, and layer thickness, then adds the reserve you specify and converts the total into bags.

It is useful when the substrate is uneven, when the tile format requires a thicker bed, or when you want to compare two adhesive systems with different consumption rates. The result helps you avoid under-ordering and gives you a clear purchase quantity instead of a rough guess.
howItWorks: Measure the tiled area in square meters.
Enter the product’s consumption per 1 mm in kg/m²/mm.
Set the planned adhesive layer thickness in millimeters.
Add a reserve percentage for cuts, unevenness, and mixing losses.
Enter the bag weight to convert kilograms into the number of bags.

useCases.title: Bathroom wall and floor estimate
useCases.description: Work out adhesive for a bathroom where walls and floor use different thicknesses and the substrate is not perfectly even.

useCases.title: Large-format porcelain tiles
useCases.description: Check the higher material demand caused by thicker bedding and compare it with a standard wall-tile installation.

useCases.title: Purchase list before a renovation
useCases.description: Translate the planned tiled area into kilograms and bag count before visiting the supplier.

useCases.title: Comparing two adhesive products
useCases.description: See how a change in consumption rate affects the total amount when you are choosing between two brands or classes.

examples.title: Small hallway
examples.input: Area: 12 m²; consumption: 1.4 kg/m²/mm; thickness: 4 mm; waste: 8%; bag weight: 25 kg
examples.output: Base: 67.2 kg; with waste: 72.6 kg; bags: 3
examples.description: A compact job with a modest reserve still requires three full bags.

examples.title: Kitchen floor with thicker bed
examples.input: Area: 18.5 m²; consumption: 1.6 kg/m²/mm; thickness: 6 mm; waste: 10%; bag weight: 20 kg
examples.output: Base: 177.6 kg; with waste: 195.4 kg; bags: 10
examples.description: A thicker layer increases demand fast, so the rounded bag count matters.

examples.title: Utility room on a tight budget
examples.input: Area: 7.8 m²; consumption: 1.2 kg/m²/mm; thickness: 3 mm; waste: 5%; bag weight: 25 kg
examples.output: Base: 28.1 kg; with waste: 29.5 kg; bags: 2
examples.description: Even a small room can still require two bags once the reserve is included.

faq.question: Why does thickness change the result so much?
faq.answer: The calculator multiplies consumption per millimeter by the planned layer thickness, so every extra millimeter adds another full portion of adhesive across the whole area.

faq.question: What if my product label gives consumption per square meter without the per-mm value?
faq.answer: Use the product’s stated coverage directly only if it already includes the intended layer thickness. If it is listed per millimeter, keep the thickness field as your planned bed size.

faq.question: Should I use the exact bag weight from the package?
faq.answer: Yes. A 20 kg bag and a 25 kg bag produce different counts, and using the wrong weight can leave you short or overbuying.

faq.question: Why is the bag count rounded up?
faq.answer: Because adhesive is sold in whole bags. Rounding down can leave you without enough material for the final rows or for repair of uneven spots.

faq.question: What mistakes make the estimate too low?
faq.answer: Common errors are entering square feet instead of square meters, forgetting to include reserve, using the wrong thickness, or choosing a consumption rate for a different product class.

seo.title: Tile Adhesive Calculator
seo.description: Estimate tile adhesive in kg and bags from area, consumption rate, layer thickness, waste, and bag weight.
